nasb.text: Their inner thought is that their houses are forever And their dwelling places to all generations; They have called their lands after their own names.

esv.text: Their graves are their homes forever, their dwelling places to all generations, though they called lands by their own names.

cnv.text: 他們心裡想，他們的家必永存， 他們的住處必留到萬代； 他們以自己的名，稱自己的地方。

ccb.text: 尽管他们用自己的名字来为产业命名， 坟墓却是他们永远的归宿， 世代的住处。

csbs.text: 他们以为自己的家必存到永远， 他们的住所必存到万代； 他们用自己的名字给土地命名。
